introSection: Kvasten (Swedish for Broom) is a steel suspended roller coaster located at Gröna Lund in Stockholm, Stockholm, Sweden. The ride was the first Suspended Family Coaster 395m installation from Vekoma.
fullText: Kvasten (Swedish for Broom) is a steel suspended roller coaster located at Gröna Lund in Stockholm, Stockholm, Sweden. The ride was the first Suspended Family Coaster 395m installation from Vekoma.
